underlying_goal: Launch a maimai-assistant project and fix the candidate search feature that was broken due to a maimai.cn SPA redesign
friction_detail: Initial fix appeared to not work due to a race condition with a diagnostic script competing for the same browser tab, requiring additional debugging rounds before confirming the fix was actually correct.
brief_summary: User needed to launch a maimai-assistant project and fix a broken search feature; Claude systematically diagnosed a SPA routing change as the root cause, implemented a fix to simulate user interactions instead of URL parameters, and successfully restored search functionality returning 10 candidates.
